ops.insert: Pitch Deck — Why Absolute Defence Over TrackTik & QR-Patrol
"Beyond Guard Tours. Beyond Workforce Management. Into Human Protection."
Why Absolute Defence is the layer that TrackTik and QR-Patrol cannot deliver.
Dark background. Cyan accent. Absolute Defence logo centre. No clutter. Authority.
SLIDE 2 — THE QUESTION THAT CHANGES EVERYTHING
"Your guard management system tells you WHERE your guards are."
"But when a visitor, a staff member, or a member of the public is threatened in your building right now — what does your system do for THEM?"
Pause here. Let it land. This is the gap the entire industry has ignored. TrackTik tracks guards. QR-Patrol proves guards patrolled. Neither protects the person in danger.
"TrackTik = Workforce Management. The Business of Running a Security Company."
AI-optimised guard scheduling and shift management
GPS-verified guard tour tracking (NFC, QR, GPS)
White-labelled client portals for service verification
Incident reporting by guards (ReportPro AI for report writing)
Payroll, billing, compliance licence tracking, business intelligence

TrackTik is built FOR security companies TO manage guards. It is not built for the people guards are supposed to protect. No public reporting. No anonymous channels. No real-time guidance. No AI threat intelligence. No Martyn's Law compliance engine.
Enterprise. ~$78/location/month upward. Custom quotes only. 6-12 month implementations.
"QR-Patrol = Guard Accountability. Proving the Patrol Happened."
QR/NFC/Beacon checkpoint scanning to verify guard patrol routes
Missed checkpoint alerts and patrol duration reporting
Guard SOS button and basic incident reports (multimedia)
Affordable: $3.20–$11.10/guard/month. Used by Securitas, Heathrow, IKEA, Pfizer

QR-Patrol's QR codes are scanned BY guards TO prove they were at a checkpoint. Our QR codes are scanned BY anyone IN DANGER to access real-time protection. Same technology. Fundamentally different purpose.
No public/victim reporting. No anonymous channels. No AI triage. No threat heatmaps. No in-the-moment guidance. No Martyn's Law engine. No behavioural training.
SLIDE 5 — THE THREE LAYERS (We Complete the Stack)
"Three Platforms. Three Purposes. One Missing Layer."
Three stacked layers, building upward like a defence wall:
Guard Accountability. "Did the guard patrol?" QR checkpoints prove the patrol happened. Answers the question: was the guard there?
Workforce Management. "Is the operation running?" Scheduling, payroll, client portals, business admin. Answers the question: is the security business efficient?

Human Protection. "What happens when someone is actually in danger?" Real-time threat response, AI intelligence, public/victim protection, compliance evidence. Answers the question: is the person safe?
"We are not competing with TrackTik or QR-Patrol. We are the missing third layer that neither can deliver. We complete the stack."
SLIDE 6 — SAME TECHNOLOGY, DIFFERENT PURPOSE (The QR Comparison)
"QR Codes — Guard Tool vs Human Shield"
Visual: Split screen — LEFT vs RIGHT
Guard scans QR code on wall → System logs "Guard was at Checkpoint 7 at 02:14" → Manager sees patrol was completed. Purpose: ACCOUNTABILITY. Who scans: GUARD. Output: Timestamp.

Person in danger scans QR code on wall → Three paths appear: Report a Concern | SOS Emergency | Situational Guide → ARIA triages, Safety Lead notified, guidance delivered in real-time. Purpose: PROTECTION. Who scans: ANYONE. Output: A defended human.
This is the single most important slide. Same QR code. Completely opposite purpose. One proves a guard walked past. The other saves the person standing there.
Table: (Render as a clean comparison grid)
GUARD TOUR TRACKING — TrackTik: ✅ Advanced | QR-Patrol: ✅ Core feature | Absolute Defence: ✅ (via zone check-ins)
GUARD SCHEDULING & PAYROLL — TrackTik: ✅ AI-optimised | QR-Patrol: ✅ Basic | Absolute Defence: ✗ (not our layer)
PUBLIC/VICTIM REPORTING — TrackTik: ✗ | QR-Patrol: ✗ | Absolute Defence: ✅ Anyone, no app, 30 seconds
ANONYMOUS VOICE/TEXT CHANNEL — TrackTik: ✗ | QR-Patrol: ✗ | Absolute Defence: ✅ Voice Journal with AI sentiment analysis
AI THREAT INTELLIGENCE — TrackTik: ✗ (ReportPro = report writing only) | QR-Patrol: ✗ | Absolute Defence: ✅ ARIA — triage, pattern detection, predictive heatmaps, real-time guidance
REAL-TIME SITUATIONAL GUIDANCE — TrackTik: ✗ | QR-Patrol: ✗ | Absolute Defence: ✅ De-escalation scripts, legal position, step-by-step actions for 8 threat scenarios
SOS EMERGENCY PROTOCOL — TrackTik: ✗ | QR-Patrol: ✅ Guard SOS only | Absolute Defence: ✅ One-tap for ANYONE — auto 999, silent log, GPS, Safety Lead alert
ACKNOWLEDGEMENT CHAIN (Timed escalation) — TrackTik: ✗ | QR-Patrol: ✗ | Absolute Defence: ✅ 15min→30min→breach, fully audited
LIVE THREAT HEATMAP — TrackTik: ✗ | QR-Patrol: ✗ | Absolute Defence: ✅ Recency-weighted, zone-level, temporal patterns
MARTYN'S LAW COMPLIANCE — TrackTik: ✗ | QR-Patrol: ✗ | Absolute Defence: ✅ Out of the box
COURTROOM-READY EVIDENCE — TrackTik: Partial (guard logs) | QR-Patrol: ✗ | Absolute Defence: ✅ Full duty-of-care chain: who was alerted, when they responded, every timestamp
BEHAVIOURAL TRAINING — TrackTik: ✗ | QR-Patrol: ✗ | Absolute Defence: ✅ Military-grade, progressive, in-person, delivered by operators
DEPLOYMENT TIME — TrackTik: 6-12 months | QR-Patrol: Days | Absolute Defence: 48 hours, full platform
SLIDE 8 — ARIA: THE INTELLIGENCE LAYER THEY CAN'T BUILD
"TrackTik Has ReportPro. We Have ARIA. They Are Not The Same Thing."
Helps guards write incident reports faster using AI auto-complete
It's a typing assistant. It writes better reports. That's it.
Real-time incident triage — classifies severity, concern type, regulatory category automatically
Sentiment analysis on voice journals — detects distress, fear, urgency in anonymous reports
Threat pattern recognition — identifies spatial clusters, temporal hotspots, repeat offenders
Predictive heatmapping — "This car park is 4.2x more likely to have an incident Fridays 20:00–23:00"
On-demand legal and situational guidance — tells the person what to do RIGHT NOW
Drafts Safety Lead escalation messages, compliance reports, and risk summaries in seconds

ReportPro helps a guard write a better sentence. ARIA analyses the entire threat landscape, predicts where danger will strike next, and tells the person in danger what to do. They are not even in the same category.
SLIDE 9 — THE CRISIS THEIR PLATFORMS IGNORE
"642,000 Workplace Violence Incidents. Zero Guard Tour Systems Helped The Victim."
642,000 workplace violence incidents in UK — HSE 2023/24
41,226 physical assaults on NHS staff — up 21% since 2019
78% of retail workers verbally assaulted — BRC 2025
86% of tradespeople report customer abuse — 10% face physical attacks
Martyn's Law incoming — fines up to £18M for non-compliance

TrackTik's scheduling didn't prevent any of these. QR-Patrol's checkpoint scans didn't help the person being attacked. The guard management layer is necessary — but it is not sufficient. Protection requires a different system.
SLIDE 10 — THE ACKNOWLEDGEMENT CHAIN (What Courtrooms Ask For)
"If Nobody Responds, The System Escalates. Automatically."
T+0 — Incident logged. Safety Lead notified instantly. Clock starts.
T+15min — No acknowledgement? Auto-escalate to Tier 2 contact.
T+30min — No Tier 2 response? Compliance breach logged. Full audit trail created.
Every timestamp. Every decision. Every delay. Courtroom-ready.
TrackTik logs guard activity, not organisational response. QR-Patrol: None. Neither platform can demonstrate that the right people were alerted, responded within SLA, or escalated appropriately.
SLIDE 11 — NINE AI AGENTS (The Organisational Brain)
"Nine Specialised AI Agents. One Organisational Defence System."
Visual: Circular diagram with SENTINEL at centre, 8 agents around the perimeter:
SENTINEL (Orchestrator) — Routes and coordinates all agents
ARIA (Threat Intelligence) — Analyses every report, scores risk, detects patterns
GUARDIAN (Triage & Response) — Classifies severity, deploys guidance, manages SLA
WITNESS (Evidence) — Constructs courtroom-ready case files in real-time
COMPASS (Compliance) — Monitors Martyn's Law, RIDDOR, ISO 45001, KCSIE
ORACLE (Predictive) — Historical pattern analysis, seasonal risk, proactive advisories
BRIDGE (Communications) — Multi-channel alerts, client reports, victim follow-up
FORGE (Training) — Identifies capability gaps, generates training recommendations
SHIELD (Insurance) — Risk scores, premium reduction evidence, insurer-ready packs
TrackTik has one AI feature: ReportPro (report writing). QR-Patrol has zero AI. We have nine specialised agents working in concert.
"What You Pay. What You Get. What You're Still Missing."

~$78/location/month. Enterprise quotes only. 6-12 month implementation. You get: guard management, scheduling, payroll, client portal. You DON'T get: public protection, AI threat intel, compliance engine, training.
$3.20–$11.10/guard/month. Self-serve. Deploys in days. You get: checkpoint scanning, guard SOS, patrol reports. You DON'T get: public reporting, AI, heatmaps, guidance, compliance, training.

Sub-£5k/yr per site. 48-hour deployment. You get: EVERYTHING on the human protection layer — AI triage, public reporting, SOS, heatmaps, acknowledgement chain, compliance engine, situational guidance, evidence chain. Plus military-grade training.
You can use all three. TrackTik for your guards. QR-Patrol for your checkpoints. Absolute Defence for your people. Or you can keep paying for two systems and leave the people unprotected.
"We're not asking you to replace them. We're asking you to finish the job."
TrackTik tells you your guards are deployed. It doesn't tell your receptionist what to do when someone threatens her.
QR-Patrol proves your guard was at Checkpoint 7. It doesn't help the student being bullied at Checkpoint 7.
Neither will generate the compliance evidence Martyn's Law demands.
Neither will produce the duty-of-care documentation a courtroom requires.
Neither trains your people to handle a hostile situation without freezing.
"Absolute Defence doesn't replace your guard management. It protects the people your guards are there to protect."
"When Something Happens In Your Building Tomorrow…"
"Will your guard tour system help the person being threatened?"
"Will your checkpoint scanner give them guidance on what to do?"
"Will your system prove to a court that you did everything right?"
Deploy in 48 hours. Live demo available now.
Built by operators. Not software companies.
